human_verification.notes: Reviewed manifest, authority source metadata, research summary, functionality map, scenario suite, evaluation results, readiness evidence, deployment notes, and commercialization notes for consistency with issue #1604 and the repository spec-pack contract.

source_classes: Recognized workflow references tied directly to the lane
Evidence or control standards relevant to the lane

source_freshness.decay_policy: Review at source-specific intervals or immediately after NIST, CISA, CIS, OWASP, Microsoft, PCI, or tenant policy changes that affect identity control claims.

notes: Structured evidence supports the validated claim required by issue #1604.
The package is refreshed as the canonical spec pack; any committed built implementation is baseline context only.
Runtime remains specification-based unless future frequent-use evidence justifies trusted built promotion.
Research summary and functionality map are complete and aligned to required scenario coverage.
Deployment and commercialization notes document tenant isolation, rollback, monitoring, logging, buyer profile, packaging, subscription model, proof points, and go-to-market gaps.
